2021May 10, 2021

Virtual

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Virtual, May 10, 2021 -- May 14, 2021

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2021-05-virtual

20 Resolutions

1074Plenary
Update SC 4 Handbook standing documents via CIB
SC 4 requests the Committee Manager launch an eight week CIB to modify the SC 4 Handbook to account for the following changes in approved standing documents: * Deprecate SC4 N2412 "Supplementary di...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1073Plenary
Establish Ad Hoc Group on UUID management for industrial data
SC 4 establishes an Ad Hoc Group "UUID management for industrial data" with the following terms of reference: * Define the opportunity space for UUID in context of SC 4 standards * Identify use cas...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1072Plenary
Launch minor revisions to ISO 10303-210, 10303-238, and 10303-242
Launch minor revisions to ISO 10303-210 ed 4, ISO 10303-238 ed 2, and ISO 10303-242 ed 2
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1071Plenary
Launch combined NP/CD ballot for ISO 10303-239 ed3
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to launch edition 3 using the SDT 24 track, naming Yves Baudier (yves.baudier@afnet.fr) and Patrick Walsh (patrick.l.walsh@boeing.com) as Project Leaders, and al...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1069Plenary
Extend term of Ad Hoc Group 2 on Nuclear Digital Ecosystem Specification
SC 4 extends the term for AHG 2 to the 82nd plenary where a final report will be provided.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1067Plenary
Request 9-month schedule extension for ISO/TS 23301 from ISO TMB
SC 4 requests the ISO TMB grant a nine-month extension to the schedule of ISO/AWI TS 23301 (project 75189) allowing the project team additional time to complete CD/TS by 2021-12-09 through necessar...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1066Plenary
Change ISO 8000-110 ed2 to SDT 36 development track
Change to project duration of ISO 8000-110 edition 2 -- Master data: Exchange of characteristic data: Syntax, semantic encoding, and conformance to data specification
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1065Plenary
Request ISO TMB place ISO 10303-209 ed3 on hold for six months
SC 4 requests the TMB to place the project on hold for six months in order that the project team can address challenges with the project staffing.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1064Plenary

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
